# Chatbot Backlog (2026-04-26)

Scope: chatbot runtime behavior, intent profile behavior, and cross-module command UX.

- Active chatbot-related stories can span modules and are tracked in:
  - `outstanding-build-priorities` (cross-module parity and QA gates)
  - `oliver-requirements` (`US-O11`)
  - `campaigns...` and module-specific bundles where command behavior is module-bound
- Add chatbot-only stories here when behavior is constrained strictly to shared chatbot runtime surfaces.
